title: 'abal #0056
definition:
1) to mourn, lament
    1a) (Qal) to mourn, lament
        1a1) of humans
        1a2) of inanimate objects (fig.)
             1a2a) of gates
             1a2b) of land
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to mourn, cause to mourn (fig.)
    1c) (Hithpael)
        1c1) to mourn
        1c2) play the mourner
